en.title: My Porfolio
en.description: Full Stack Developer and Systems Engineering student with experience in designing, developing, and implementing web applications. Focused on building efficient solutions using Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, SQL Server, and cloud services.

es.title: Mi Portafolio
